subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest me in this vast and distant land, far removed from Thy sacred threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی ترانی فی هذه البلاد الشاسعه الارجاء القاصیه عن عتبتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
